summary: Iteration 21: Bulk Screening Feature Testing Complete. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: Tab switcher, CSV template download, file upload, preview table, Screen All button, results table with Name/Match/Risk Score/Match Type/SLA columns, Download Excel button, and Batch History section.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly (known from iteration 20)

passed_tests: GET /api/screenings/bulk/csv-template requires authentication (401)
POST /api/screenings/bulk/upload requires authentication (401)
GET /api/screenings/bulk/history requires authentication (401)
GET /api/screenings/bulk/csv-template returns 200 with text/csv content type
CSV template has correct headers: name, dob, nationality, id_type, id_number
CSV template has 3 Indian example rows with IN nationality
POST /api/screenings/bulk/upload accepts valid CSV and returns batch_id + total + preview
POST /api/screenings/bulk/upload rejects empty CSV with 400
POST /api/screenings/bulk/upload rejects CSV without 'name' column with 400
Upload preview contains parsed entity data with correct fields
POST /api/screenings/bulk/{batch_id}/run screens all entities and returns results
Screening results have required fields: full_name, has_match, risk_score, risk_level, sla_status
POST /api/screenings/bulk/{invalid_batch_id}/run returns 404
POST /api/screenings/bulk/{batch_id}/run on completed batch returns 400
GET /api/screenings/bulk/{batch_id}/progress returns screened_count and total_entities
GET /api/screenings/bulk/{invalid_batch_id}/progress returns 404
GET /api/screenings/bulk/{batch_id}/download returns .xlsx file with correct content type
GET /api/screenings/bulk/{invalid_batch_id}/download returns 404
GET /api/screenings/bulk/{batch_id}/download on incomplete batch returns 400
GET /api/screenings/bulk/history returns batches list
History batch items have required fields: batch_id, status, total_entities, created_at
History excludes entities and results arrays for performance
Completed batches in history show match_count
UI: Tab switcher (Individual/Bulk Upload) present and functional
UI: Bulk Upload tab shows upload dropzone with Choose File button
UI: Download CSV Template button works - downloads rudrik_screening_template.csv
UI: File upload shows preview table with entity count
UI: Screen All button runs screening
UI: Results table shows Name, Match (YES/NO), Risk Score, Match Type, SLA status columns
UI: Download Excel button triggers .xlsx download
UI: Batch History section shows completed batches with date, file, entities, matches, download link
UI: Individual tab still shows search filters and history table correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Bulk screening uses demo mode (Sanctions.io mock data) - MOCKED as expected
Excel generation uses real openpyxl library - NOT MOCKED
CSV parsing correctly handles missing optional fields (dob, nationality, id_type, id_number)
SLA status computed dynamically based on screening duration vs configured target
Batch history correctly excludes large arrays (entities, results) for performance
Frontend correctly displays all bulk screening components with proper data-testid attributes
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_bulk_screening.py (new - 23 test cases for bulk screening endpoints)
seed_data_creation: None - test batches created during testing are stored in bulk_batches collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk Screening feature fully tested. Key data-testid attributes: screening-mode-tabs, tab-individual, tab-bulk, bulk-screening-panel, download-csv-template-btn, csv-file-input, csv-file-input-label, upload-csv-btn, run-bulk-screening-btn, bulk-progress-bar, bulk-results, download-results-btn, new-bulk-screening-btn, bulk-history-section, toggle-bulk-history, batch-{batch_id}, download-batch-{batch_id}. CSV template has headers: name,dob,nationality,id_type,id_number with 3 Indian example rows. Screening uses DEMO MODE (Sanctions.io mock data). Excel generation is REAL via openpyxl.

mocked_apis.SLA Metrics: MOCKED - GET /api/sla-metrics returns deterministic mock data
